If activity was not attempted, code reason:

896 PRSNL_HYGN_ADMSN_CD PRSNL_HYGN_ADMSN_CD GG0130I1 Personal Hygiene (Start of Stay Perf) CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's performance for personal hybiene at the start of the facility stay. 06=Independent
